eras.name: The Creator Era
eras.description: This era belongs to the makers — the ones who turn blank canvases into worlds. You don't just work; you express. Every output is an extension of who you are.

eras.name: The Innovator Era
eras.tagline: You build what others only imagine.
eras.description: You see systems where others see chaos. You build solutions before anyone else knows they need them. The compiler is your canvas.

eras.name: The Achiever Era
eras.tagline: Greatness is the only setting you know.
eras.description: You move people, results, and organizations forward. You set the agenda. This era belongs to the ones who make things happen at scale.

eras.name: The Explorer Era
eras.tagline: The whole world is your workspace.
eras.description: Your best ideas arrive somewhere between time zones. You've rejected the idea that work is a place — and you're designing a life that proves it.

eras.name: The Visionary Era
eras.tagline: You see the future before it arrives.
eras.description: You're not here to optimize the existing world — you're here to replace parts of it. This era belongs to founders, reformers, and the obsessively long-term.

eras.name: The Performer Era
eras.tagline: When you play, the world watches.
eras.description: This isn't a hobby — it's a craft, a career, a community. You perform at a level most people never reach, and your setup needs to match that standard.
